title: Moderation update: recent high-severity reports
body:
We recently reviewed several high-severity community reports:

- A phishing campaign posting malicious links across multiple channels led to an immediate ban of the account involved.
- A member engaging in targeted harassment of newcomers has received a formal warning; any further incidents will result in removal.
- A mass report against a core maintainer was investigated and determined to be unfounded, likely the result of organized brigading; no action was taken against the maintainer.

We apply our community guidelines consistently, regardless of role or popularity. Thank you to those who reported issues in good faith and helped keep this space safe. If you have questions or believe a decision should be reconsidered, please contact the mod team through the normal appeals channel.
